pairs.hazard: Doris lower() folds full Unicode ('İ'->'i̇'); ClickHouse lower() is ASCII-only ('İ' unchanged). Use ClickHouse lowerUTF8 for parity (still an İ/ß edge).
pairs.provenance: live differential probe 2026-07-13: Doris (FE pr62767-local / BE 4.1.2) vs ClickHouse 26.5.1.1 (chdb); docs/research/probe-runs/doris-clickhouse.{clickhouse,doris}.tsv

pairs.hazard: Doris upper() folds full Unicode ('ß'->'SS'); ClickHouse upper() is ASCII-only ('ß' unchanged). ClickHouse upperUTF8 approaches Doris but 'ß'->'SS' is length-changing.
pairs.provenance: live differential probe 2026-07-13: Doris (FE pr62767-local / BE 4.1.2) vs ClickHouse 26.5.1.1 (chdb); docs/research/probe-runs/doris-clickhouse.{clickhouse,doris}.tsv

pairs.hazard: Doris reverse() is code-point-wise ('中文x'->'x文中'); ClickHouse reverse() is BYTE-wise (mojibake on multibyte). ClickHouse reverseUTF8 matches Doris.
pairs.provenance: live differential probe 2026-07-13: Doris (FE pr62767-local / BE 4.1.2) vs ClickHouse 26.5.1.1 (chdb); docs/research/probe-runs/doris-clickhouse.{clickhouse,doris}.tsv

pairs.hazard: Doris round() is half-away-from-zero (round(2.5)=3, round(-2.5)=-3); ClickHouse round() is banker's/half-even (2 and -2). round(0.5): Doris 1 vs ClickHouse 0.
pairs.provenance: live differential probe 2026-07-13: Doris (FE pr62767-local / BE 4.1.2) vs ClickHouse 26.5.1.1 (chdb); docs/research/probe-runs/doris-clickhouse.{clickhouse,doris}.tsv

pairs.hazard: Numbering differs: Doris dayofweek() is Sun=1..Sat=7 (MySQL); ClickHouse toDayOfWeek is ISO Mon=1..Sun=7. Sunday: Doris 1 vs ClickHouse 7; Monday: 2 vs 1.
pairs.provenance: live differential probe 2026-07-13: Doris (FE pr62767-local / BE 4.1.2) vs ClickHouse 26.5.1.1 (chdb); docs/research/probe-runs/doris-clickhouse.{clickhouse,doris}.tsv

pairs.hazard: Doris week() defaults to mode 0 (Sunday-based) == ClickHouse week() default mode 0; the SOURCE-AWARE generator now emits faithful `week` for doris->clickhouse (NOT toISOWeek, which would be wrong — Doris week is not ISO). pairs.provenance: cross-engine aggregate probe 2026-07-13: DuckDB 1.5.4 / ClickHouse 26.5.1.1 (chdb) / Trino 481 / Doris (FE pr62767-local, BE 4.1.2); docs/research/probe-runs/aggregates-round.*

pairs.hazard: Bare variance() DEFAULT differs: Doris is POPULATION; DuckDB/Trino SAMPLE (1.84 vs 2.3). ClickHouse has NO bare variance() (only varSamp/varPop) so it must be translated. Use var_pop/var_samp explicitly.

pairs.hazard: Doris xxhash_32 == ClickHouse xxHash32 (direct live re-probe 2026-07-14: 'abc'->852579327, ''->46947589 both match exactly). brikk emits the xxHash32 rename. Conditionally-equivalent for the UInt32 vs Doris return-type/width representation. (Contrast xxhash_64, which is a genuinely different hash and stays divergent.) See probe-runs/doris-xxhash-week-reprobe.results.tsv.
pairs.provenance: auto differential probe (doris mass round) 2026-07-13: Doris (FE pr62767-local/BE 4.1.2) vs ClickHouse 26.5.1.1 (chdb); docs/research/probe-runs/doris-clickhouse-mass.* | corrected divergent 2026-07-14 (inferred from xxhash_64 live probe; re-probe xxhash_32) | direct re-probe 2026-07-14: matches xxHash32, re-landed rename

pairs.hazard: CORRECTION (live reverse probe 2026-07-14, doris-ducklake agent): Doris xxhash_64('abc') = 8696274497037089104 vs ClickHouse xxHash64('abc') = 4952883123889572249 — a DIFFERENT hash value (impl/seed differ), NOT the same digest. The earlier auto-probe 'digest agrees' verdict was wrong. brikk does NOT emit the xxHash64 rename (would silently produce a wrong hash); kept divergent so certify refuses. See probe-runs/reverse-doris-trino.results.tsv.
